title: Descends From Nobility
summary: A descendent of wealth and power, you carry a noble title and the abilities granted by a privileged upbringing.
tiers: Tier 3: Advanced Command or Noble’s Courage
Tier 6: Able Assistance or Mind of a Leader
gm_intrusions: Debts incurred by a family are owed by the character. A long-lost sibling seeks to disinherit rivals. An assassin finds the character.
text: A descendent of wealth and power, you carry a noble title and the abilities granted by a privileged upbringing. Type Swap Option: Retinue
details: A descendent of wealth and power, you carry a noble title and the abilities granted by a privileged upbringing.
